goals.goal: ex (fun x0 : B => E.In x0 (cl X))

forall (x1 x2 : B) (_ : E.In x1 (cl X)) (_ : E.In x2 (cl X)),
E.In (BooleanAlgebra.andB x1 x2) (cl X)

forall (x : B) (_ : E.In x (cl X)) (x' : B) (_ : leProp x x'),
E.In x' (cl X)

attempts:
apply isFilter_intro.
- exists trueB; unfold cl; exists []; split; [intros x H; inversion H | rewrite andsB_zero; reflexivity].
- intros x1 x2 Hx1 Hx2; destruct Hx1 as [xs1 [Hxs1 Hle1]], Hx2 as [xs2 [Hxs2 Hle2]]; unfold cl; exists (xs1 ++ xs2); split; [intros x H; apply L.In_app_iff in H; destruct H as [H|H]; [apply Hxs1 | apply Hxs2]; assumption | rewrite andsB_app; apply andB_compathWith_leProp; [exact Hle1 | exact Hle2]].
- intros x Hx x' Hle; destruct Hx as [xs [Hxs Hle_xs_x]]; unfold cl; exists xs; split; [assumption | etransitivity; eassumption].

apply isFilter_intro.
- refine (ex_intro (cl X) trueB
          (ex_intro (fun xs => and (forall y, L.In y xs -> E.In y X)
                                   (leProp (andsB xs) trueB))
                    []
                    (conj (fun y Hy => match Hy with end)
                          (leB_PartialOrder.(partial_order_equivalence) andsB_zero)))).
- refine (fun x1 x2 Hx1 Hx2 =>
            let (xs1, H1) := Hx1 in
            let (Hxs1_in, Hxs1_le) := H1 in
            let (xs2, H2) := Hx2 in
            let (Hxs2_in, Hxs2_le) := H2 in
            ex_intro (fun xs => and (forall y, L.In y xs -> E.In y X)
                                    (leProp (andsB xs) (andB x1 x2)))
                     (xs1 ++ xs2)
                     (conj (fun y Hy => let H := L.In_app_or xs1 xs2 y Hy in
                                        match H with
                                        | or_introl H' => Hxs1_in y H'
                                        | or_intror H' => Hxs2_in y H'
                                        end)
                           ((leB_PreOrder.(PreOrder_Transitive).(transitivity))
                              (andsB (xs1 ++ xs2)) (andB (andsB xs1) (andsB xs2)) (andB x1 x2)
                              (leB_PartialOrder.(partial_order_equivalence) (andsB_app xs1 xs2))
                              (andB_compathWith_leProp (andsB xs1) x1 (andsB xs2) x2 Hxs1_le Hxs2_le)))).
- refine (fun x Hx x' Hle =>
            let (xs, H) := Hx in
            let (Hxs_in, Hxs_le) := H in
            ex_intro (fun xs => and (forall y, L.In y xs -> E.In y X)
                                    (leProp (andsB xs) x'))
                     xs
                     (conj Hxs_in
                           ((leB_PreOrder.(PreOrder_Transitive).(transitivity))
                              (andsB xs) x x' Hxs_le Hle))).

destruct BOOLEAN_ALGEBRA_LAWS as [andB_comp orB_comp notB_comp andB_assoc orB_assoc andB_comm orB_comm andB_distr_orB orB_distr_andB trueB_id_andB falseB_id_orB falseB_ann_andB trueB_ann_orB andB_idem orB_idem Abs andB_notB_falseB orB_notB_trueB]. destruct SETOID as [eq [eq_refl eq_sym eq_trans]]. exact (let leProp_refl : forall x, leProp x x := fun x => andB_idem x in
let leProp_trans : forall a b c, leProp a b -> leProp b c -> leProp a c :=
  fun a b c H H0 =>
    eq_trans (eq_trans (eq_trans (andB_comp a (andB a b) c c (eq_sym H) (eq_refl c))
                    (andB_assoc a b c))
              (andB_comp a a (andB b c) b (eq_refl a) H0)) H in
let leProp_and_monotone : forall x y z w, leProp x y -> leProp z w -> leProp (andB x z) (andB y w) :=
  fun x y z w Hxy Hzw =>
    let H_reassoc : eqProp (andB z (andB y w)) (andB y (andB z w)) :=
      eq_trans (eq_sym (andB_assoc z y w))
        (eq_trans (andB_comp (andB z y) (andB y z) w w (andB_comm z y) (eq_refl w))
                  (andB_assoc y z w)) in
    eq_trans
      (eq_trans (andB_assoc x z (andB y w))
                (eq_trans (andB_comp x x (andB z (andB y w)) (andB y (andB z w)) (eq_refl x) H_reassoc)
                          (eq_sym (andB_assoc x y (andB z w)))))
      (eq_trans (andB_comp (andB x y) x (andB z w) (andB z w) Hxy (eq_refl (andB z w)))
                (andB_comp x x (andB z w) z (eq_refl x) Hzw)) in
let eq_to_leProp : forall x y, eqProp x y -> leProp x y :=
  fun x y H => eq_trans (andB_comp x x y x (eq_refl x) (eq_sym H)) (andB_idem x) in
let andsB_app : forall l1 l2 : list B, eqProp (andsB (l1 ++ l2)) (andB (andsB l1) (andsB l2)) :=
  fix rec (l1 : list B) : forall l2 : list B, eqProp (andsB (l1 ++ l2)) (andB (andsB l1) (andsB l2)) :=
  match l1 return (forall l2 : list B, eqProp (andsB (l1 ++ l2)) (andB (andsB l1) (andsB l2))) with
  | [] => fun l2 => eq_sym (trueB_id_andB (andsB l2))
  | a :: l1' => fun l2 =>
    eq_trans (andB_comp a a (andsB (l1' ++ l2)) (andB (andsB l1') (andsB l2)) (eq_refl a) (rec l1' l2))
             (andB_assoc a (andsB l1') (andsB l2))
  end in
isFilter_if (cl X)
  (fun xs H =>
    let aux : forall (xs : list B), (forall x, L.In x xs -> cl X x) -> cl X (andsB xs) :=
      fix aux (xs : list B) : (forall x, L.In x xs -> cl X x) -> cl X (andsB xs) :=
      fun H => match xs return ((forall x, L.In x xs -> cl X x) -> cl X (andsB xs)) with
               | [] => fun _ =>
                 ex_intro (fun zs => (forall y, L.In y zs -> X y) /\ leProp (andsB zs) (andsB [])) []
                   (conj (fun y Hy => False_rect (X y) Hy) (leProp_refl (andsB [])))
               | a :: xs' => fun H =>
                 let Ha : cl X a := H a (L.in_eq B a xs') in
                 let Hxs' : forall x, L.In x xs' -> cl X x := fun x h => H x (L.in_cons B a x xs' h) in
                 let r : cl X (andsB xs') := aux xs' Hxs' in
                 let (zs1, (Hxs1, Hle1)) := Ha in
                 let (zs2, (Hxs2, Hle2)) := r in
                 let zs := zs1 ++ zs2 in
                 ex_intro (fun zs => (forall y, L.In y zs -> X y) /\ leProp (andsB zs) (andsB (a :: xs'))) zs
                   (conj
                     (fun y Hy =>
                       let H' := L.in_app_or B zs1 zs2 y Hy in
                       match H' with
                       | or_introl h => Hxs1 y h
                       | or_intror h => Hxs2 y h
                       end)
                     (leProp_trans (andsB zs) (andB (andsB zs1) (andsB zs2)) (andB a (andsB xs'))
                        (eq_to_leProp (andsB zs) (andB (andsB zs1) (andsB zs2)) (andsB_app zs1 zs2))
                        (leProp_and_monotone (andsB zs1) a (andsB zs2) (andsB xs') Hle1 Hle2)))
               end
      in
    aux xs H)
  (fun x (Hx : cl X x) x' (Hle : leProp x x') =>
    let (zs, (Hxs, Hlez)) := Hx in
    ex_intro (fun zs => (forall y, L.In y zs -> X y) /\ leProp (andsB zs) x') zs
      (conj Hxs (leProp_trans (andsB zs) x x' Hlez Hle)))).

induction l1 as [|x xs IH]; intros l2.
- simpl; apply leProp_refl.
- simpl; apply andB_le_compat_r; auto. apply isFilter_if.
- intros xs H; induction xs as [|x xs IH].
-- exists []; split; [intros; inversion H|]; apply (trueB_id_andB trueB).
-- destruct (H x (L.in_eq _ _)) as [l1 [Hl1 Hle1]],
               (IH (fun y Hy => H y (L.in_cons _ _ _ Hy))) as [l2 [Hl2 Hle2]]. exists (l1 ++ l2); split.
--- intros a Ha; apply L.in_app_or in Ha; destruct Ha; auto.
--- apply (leProp_glb (andsB (l1 ++ l2)) x (andsB xs));
          [ apply leProp_trans with (andsB l1); [apply andsB_le_l | assumption]
          | apply leProp_trans with (andsB l2); [apply andsB_le_r | assumption] ].
- intros x Hx x' Hle; destruct Hx as [l [Hl Hle']]. exists l; split; auto; apply leProp_trans with x; assumption.

                (andB_comp x x (andB z w) z (eq_refl x) Hzw)) in
let eq_to_leProp : forall x y, eqProp x y -> leProp x y :=
  fun x y H => eq_trans (andB_comp x x y x (eq_refl x) (eq_sym H)) (andB_idem x) in
let andsB_app : forall l1 l2 : list B, eqProp (andsB (l1 ++ l2)) (andB (andsB l1) (andsB l2)) :=
  fix rec (l1 : list B) : forall l2 : list B, eqProp (andsB (l1 ++ l2)) (andB (andsB l1) (andsB l2)) :=
  match l1 return (forall l2 : list B, eqProp (andsB (l1 ++ l2)) (andB (andsB l1) (andsB l2))) with
  | [] => fun l2 => eq_sym (trueB_id_andB (andsB l2))
  | a :: l1' => fun l2 =>
    eq_trans (andB_comp a a (andsB (l1' ++ l2)) (andB (andsB l1') (andsB l2)) (eq_refl a) (rec l1' l2))
             (andB_assoc a (andsB l1') (andsB l2))
  end in
isFilter_if (cl X)
  (fun xs H =>
    let aux : forall (xs : list B), (forall x, L.In x xs -> cl X x) -> cl X (andsB xs) :=
      fix aux (xs : list B) : (forall x, L.In x xs -> cl X x) -> cl X (andsB xs) :=
      fun H => match xs return ((forall x, L.In x xs -> cl X x) -> cl X (andsB xs)) with
               | [] => fun _ =>
                 ex_intro (fun zs => (forall y, L.In y zs -> X y) /\ leProp (andsB zs) (andsB [])) []
                   (conj (fun y Hy => False_rect (X y) Hy) (leProp_refl (andsB [])))
               | a :: xs' => fun H =>
                 let Ha : cl X a := H a (L.in_eq B a xs') in
                 let Hxs' : forall x, L.In x xs' -> cl X x := fun x h => H x (L.in_cons B a x xs' h) in
                 let r : cl X (andsB xs') := aux xs' Hxs' in
                 let (zs1, (Hxs1, Hle1)) := Ha in
                 let (zs2, (Hxs2, Hle2)) := r in
                 let zs := zs1 ++ zs2 in
                 ex_intro (fun zs => (forall y, L.In y zs -> X y) /\ leProp (andsB zs) (andsB (a :: xs'))) zs
                   (conj
                     (fun y Hy =>
                       let H' := L.in_app_or B zs1 zs2 y Hy in
                       match H' with
                       | or_introl h => Hxs1 y h
                       | or_intror h => Hxs2 y h
                       end)
                     (leProp_trans (andsB zs) (andB (andsB zs1) (andsB zs2)) (andB a (andsB xs'))
                        (eq_to_leProp (andsB zs) (andB (andsB zs1) (andsB zs2)) (andsB_app zs1 zs2))
                        (leProp_and_monotone (andsB zs1) a (andsB zs2) (andsB xs') Hle1 Hle2)))
               end
      in
    aux xs H)
  (fun x (Hx : cl X x) x' (Hle : leProp x x') =>
    let (zs, (Hxs, Hlez)) := Hx in
    ex_intro (fun zs => (forall y, L.In y zs -> X y) /\ leProp (andsB zs) x') zs
      (conj Hxs (leProp_trans (andsB zs) x x' Hlez Hle)))).

exists trueB. unfold E.In, cl. exists nil. split.
- intros x H; inversion H.
- simpl. sfirstorder.
attempts: exists trueB; unfold cl; exists []; split; [intros x H; inversion H | rewrite andsB_zero; reflexivity].

          (ex_intro (fun xs => and (forall y, L.In y xs -> E.In y X)
                                   (leProp (andsB xs) trueB))
                    []
                    (conj (fun y Hy => match Hy with end)
                          (leB_PartialOrder.(partial_order_equivalence) andsB_zero)))).

- intros x H; inversion H.

exists trueB; unfold E.In, cl; exists nil; unfold NW; simpl; split; [exact (fun y H => match H with end) | unfold leProp; simpl; apply (proj2 (BOOLEAN_ALGEBRA_LAWS.(trueB_id_andB) trueB))].

proofs: unfold E.In, cl, NW in *. intros x1 x2 H1 H2. destruct H1 as [xs1 [H1xs H1le]], H2 as [xs2 [H2xs H2le]]. exists (xs1 ++ xs2); split.

hypotheses: H2xs : forall (x : B) (_ : L.In x xs2), E.In x X
H1xs : forall (x : B) (_ : L.In x xs1), E.In x X
goals.goal: forall (x : B) (_ : L.In x (app xs1 xs2)), E.In x X

hypotheses: H2xs : forall (x : B) (_ : L.In x xs2), E.In x X
H1xs : forall (x : B) (_ : L.In x xs1), E.In x X
goals.goal: leProp (andsB (app xs1 xs2)) (BooleanAlgebra.andB x1 x2)

proofs: intros x1 x2 Hx1 Hx2. destruct Hx1 as [xs1 [Hxs1 Hle1]]. destruct Hx2 as [xs2 [Hxs2 Hle2]]. exists (xs1 ++ xs2). split.

hypotheses:
Hle2 : NW
  (fun andsB_LE : unit =>
   match andsB_LE with
   | tt => leProp (andsB xs2) x2
   end)

Hxs2 : NW
  (fun FINITE_SUBSET : unit =>
   match FINITE_SUBSET with
   | tt => forall (x : B) (_ : L.In x xs2), E.In x X
   end)

Hle1 : NW
  (fun andsB_LE : unit =>
   match andsB_LE with
   | tt => leProp (andsB xs1) x1
   end)

Hxs1 : NW
  (fun FINITE_SUBSET : unit =>
   match FINITE_SUBSET with
   | tt => forall (x : B) (_ : L.In x xs1), E.In x X
   end)
goals.goal:
NW
  (fun FINITE_SUBSET : unit =>
   match FINITE_SUBSET with
   | tt => forall (x : B) (_ : L.In x (app xs1 xs2)), E.In x X
   end)

hypotheses:
Hle2 : NW
  (fun andsB_LE : unit =>
   match andsB_LE with
   | tt => leProp (andsB xs2) x2
   end)

Hxs2 : NW
  (fun FINITE_SUBSET : unit =>
   match FINITE_SUBSET with
   | tt => forall (x : B) (_ : L.In x xs2), E.In x X
   end)

Hle1 : NW
  (fun andsB_LE : unit =>
   match andsB_LE with
   | tt => leProp (andsB xs1) x1
   end)

Hxs1 : NW
  (fun FINITE_SUBSET : unit =>
   match FINITE_SUBSET with
   | tt => forall (x : B) (_ : L.In x xs1), E.In x X
   end)
goals.goal:
NW
  (fun andsB_LE : unit =>
   match andsB_LE with
   | tt => leProp (andsB (app xs1 xs2)) (BooleanAlgebra.andB x1 x2)
   end)

nodes.proof:
intros x1 x2 H1 H2. unfold E.In, cl, NW in *; simpl in *. destruct H1 as [xs1 [HX1 Hle1]], H2 as [xs2 [HX2 Hle2]]; exists (xs1 ++ xs2); split.
- intros x0 HIn; apply L.in_app_or in HIn; destruct HIn; [apply HX1 | apply HX2]; assumption.
- rewrite andsB_app; apply andB_compathWith_leProp; assumption.
attempts: intros x1 x2 Hx1 Hx2; destruct Hx1 as [xs1 [Hxs1 Hle1]], Hx2 as [xs2 [Hxs2 Hle2]]; unfold cl; exists (xs1 ++ xs2); split; [intros x H; apply L.In_app_iff in H; destruct H as [H|H]; [apply Hxs1 | apply Hxs2]; assumption | rewrite andsB_app; apply andB_compathWith_leProp; [exact Hle1 | exact Hle2]].

refine (fun x1 x2 Hx1 Hx2 =>
            let (xs1, H1) := Hx1 in
            let (Hxs1_in, Hxs1_le) := H1 in
            let (xs2, H2) := Hx2 in
            let (Hxs2_in, Hxs2_le) := H2 in
            ex_intro (fun xs => and (forall y, L.In y xs -> E.In y X)
                                    (leProp (andsB xs) (andB x1 x2)))
                     (xs1 ++ xs2)
                     (conj (fun y Hy => let H := L.In_app_or xs1 xs2 y Hy in
                                        match H with
                                        | or_introl H' => Hxs1_in y H'
                                        | or_intror H' => Hxs2_in y H'
                                        end)
                           ((leB_PreOrder.(PreOrder_Transitive).(transitivity))
                              (andsB (xs1 ++ xs2)) (andB (andsB xs1) (andsB xs2)) (andB x1 x2)
                              (leB_PartialOrder.(partial_order_equivalence) (andsB_app xs1 xs2))
                              (andB_compathWith_leProp (andsB xs1) x1 (andsB xs2) x2 Hxs1_le Hxs2_le)))).

intros x1 x2 H1 H2. unfold E.In, cl, NW in *; simpl in *. destruct H1 as [xs1 [HX1 Hle1]], H2 as [xs2 [HX2 Hle2]]; exists (xs1 ++ xs2); split.
- intros x0 HIn; apply L.in_app_or in HIn; destruct HIn; [apply HX1 | apply HX2]; assumption.
- rewrite andsB_app; apply andB_compathWith_leProp; assumption.

intros x1 x2 Hx1 Hx2. unfold cl in Hx1, Hx2. destruct Hx1 as [xs1 [[u1 Hxs1_all] [u2 Hxs1_le]]], Hx2 as [xs2 [[u3 Hxs2_all] [u4 Hxs2_le]]]. exists (xs1 ++ xs2); split.
- intros x Hx; destruct (L.in_app_or _ _ _ Hx) as [Hx'|Hx']; [exact (Hxs1_all x Hx')| exact (Hxs2_all x Hx')].
- rewrite andsB_app; apply (andB_compathWith_leProp _ _ _ _ Hxs1_le Hxs2_le).

unfold E.In, cl, NW in *. intros x1 x2 H1 H2. destruct H1 as [xs1 [H1xs H1le]], H2 as [xs2 [H2xs H2le]]. exists (xs1 ++ xs2); split.
- intros y Hy; apply L.In_app_or in Hy; destruct Hy as [Hy|Hy]; [apply H1xs | apply H2xs]; assumption.
- rewrite andsB_app; apply leProp_andB_compat; assumption.

intros x1 x2 Hx1 Hx2. destruct Hx1 as [xs1 [Hxs1 Hle1]]. destruct Hx2 as [xs2 [Hxs2 Hle2]]. exists (xs1 ++ xs2). split.
- intros x Hx; apply L.in_app_or in Hx; destruct Hx as [Hx|Hx]; [apply Hxs1 | apply Hxs2]; exact Hx.
- eapply leProp_trans; [apply andsB_app | apply andB_leProp_compat; [exact Hle1 | exact Hle2]].
failed_attempts: intros x1 x2 Hx1 Hx2; destruct Hx1 as [xs1 [Hxs1 Hle1]], Hx2 as [xs2 [Hxs2 Hle2]]; unfold cl; exists (xs1 ++ xs2); split; [intros x H; apply L.In_app_iff in H; destruct H as [H|H]; [apply Hxs1 | apply Hxs2]; assumption | rewrite andsB_app; apply andB_compathWith_leProp; [exact Hle1 | exact Hle2]].

refine (fun x1 x2 Hx1 Hx2 =>
            let (xs1, H1) := Hx1 in
            let (Hxs1_in, Hxs1_le) := H1 in
            let (xs2, H2) := Hx2 in
            let (Hxs2_in, Hxs2_le) := H2 in
            ex_intro (fun xs => and (forall y, L.In y xs -> E.In y X)
                                    (leProp (andsB xs) (andB x1 x2)))
                     (xs1 ++ xs2)
                     (conj (fun y Hy => let H := L.In_app_or xs1 xs2 y Hy in
                                        match H with
                                        | or_introl H' => Hxs1_in y H'
                                        | or_intror H' => Hxs2_in y H'
                                        end)
                           ((leB_PreOrder.(PreOrder_Transitive).(transitivity))
                              (andsB (xs1 ++ xs2)) (andB (andsB xs1) (andsB xs2)) (andB x1 x2)
                              (leB_PartialOrder.(partial_order_equivalence) (andsB_app xs1 xs2))
                              (andB_compathWith_leProp (andsB xs1) x1 (andsB xs2) x2 Hxs1_le Hxs2_le)))).

intros x1 x2 Hx1 Hx2. unfold cl in Hx1, Hx2. destruct Hx1 as [xs1 [[u1 Hxs1_all] [u2 Hxs1_le]]], Hx2 as [xs2 [[u3 Hxs2_all] [u4 Hxs2_le]]]. exists (xs1 ++ xs2); split.

- rewrite andsB_app; apply (andB_compathWith_leProp _ _ _ _ Hxs1_le Hxs2_le).
